calendar.matters:
ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE FOR CHANGE OF NAME
Off Calendar Aug-16-2005 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: This cause came on regularly as scheduled for OSC hearing for Change of Name of Minor.
Dept. 218, Comm. Sue Kaplan, Clerk: P. Dias, CSR: Leticia A. Perez.
Petitioner: Stephanie Jensen, in pro per, Guardian ad Litem for Minor Owen Francis Foley, was sworn and examined.
No objections to the proposed change of name were made at the hearing.
It appears to the satisfaction of the Court that all the allegations in the petition are true, correct, and sufficient and that the petition should be granted.
The Court grants the petition for Change of Name to: Owen Francis Foley Jensen.
Decree signed in open court.

ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE FOR CHANGE OF NAME
Off Calendar Aug-02-2005 Reset To Aug-16-05 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 218 For Order To Show Cause
MINI MINUTES: This cause came on regularly as scheduled for OSC hearing for Change of Name of a Minor.
Dept. 218, Comm. Sue Kaplan, Clerk: S. Ravinantapricha, CSR: Gena Eales.
Petitioner: Stephanie Jensen, present in pro per as Guardian ad litem for the Minor: Owen Francis Foley, was sworn and examined.
Lacks the Minor's Father consent, the OSC for Change of Name of a Minor is continued to Aug. 16, 2005 at 9:00 a.m. in Dept. 218.
Petitioner to submit proof of service to the Minor's father of the new hearing date, or an Order dispensing with notice.
